scripts.lint: node --check packages/scheme-engine/src/index.js && node --check packages/scheme-registry/src/index.js && node --check packages/scheme-registry/src/schema.js && node --check packages/types/src/index.js && node --check infra/scripts/repo-debug.mjs
scripts.test: node --test packages/scheme-engine/src/index.test.js packages/scheme-registry/src/schema.test.js && pnpm --filter @saashakti/scheme-ingestion test && pnpm --filter api test
scripts.qa: npm run lint && node --test packages/scheme-engine/src/index.test.js packages/scheme-registry/src/schema.test.js && pnpm --filter @saashakti/scheme-ingestion test && npm run debug
